system_status.render_status: deploying — commit 38f4310 pushed. Surface upgrade + routing fix + simulator loop resolved.

insights: Live site at qudozen.com confirmed Arabic RTL (Tailwind-based) at build start.
Brain showed v3.2 was reverted because the embedded simulator was abstracted away to a redirect. This is a non-negotiable constraint for v3.3.
v3.3 build restores English LTR layout AND embeds the simulator directly on the page via iframe with lazy-load + click-to-launch overlay.
decisions: Bumped version to 3.3 to distinguish from the previously reverted 3.2 build.
issues_found: v3.2 was reverted because simulator was a redirect-only teaser. v3.3 corrects this.

insights: 3-dot nav overlay with backdrop blur, Escape key close, backdrop click close, body scroll lock. Services accordion submenu via max-height transition.
decisions: Single nav-overlay div — no sticky header. Only 3-dot button visible at all times.

insights: All colors, radii, and transitions are CSS custom properties. Two breakpoints: 640px and 1024px.
decisions: Added --ease and --transition as separate tokens to allow duration changes without touching multiple properties.

insights: Floating orb via CSS keyframes. Gradient headline via background-clip:text. Hero CTA secondary now points to #simulator (anchor) not /growth/ghost-room.html — keeps user on page.
decisions: Hero 'Try the Live Simulator' CTA scrolls to the embedded simulator section rather than redirecting — consistent with embedded-first approach.
ui_upgrades: Pulsing live dot in hero badge signals active/live system.

insights: Alternating layout via direction:rtl on .reverse class. Collapses to single column on mobile with direction:ltr restored.
decisions: direction flip for alternating cards preserves DOM order for screen readers.
issues_found: Services subtitle did not match Step 4 spec on step-by-step audit.
fixes_applied: Subtitle updated to: 'From AI reception to autonomous growth — everything your business needs to run without you.' Committed b000bfc and pushed.

insights: Step-by-step audit caught 5 mismatches vs spec: description, all 12 features, impact text, CTA href, and sim preview href.
decisions: Simulator preview and CTA both now link to /growth/ghost-room.html per Step 5 spec. Previous decision to use #simulator anchor overridden by explicit spec requirement.
issues_found: Description was generic placeholder — not spec copy
12 features were generic — not the exact technical list (8-step flow, Calendar sync, emergency detection, NLP, etc.)
Impact text had wrong numbers (60-80% / 12h vs spec 40% / 15h)
CTA and preview both linked to #simulator instead of /growth/ghost-room.html
fixes_applied: Description: 'A WhatsApp-native AI that books appointments, handles reschedules, detects emergencies, and sends reminders — all in fluent Arabic and English. No human intervention needed.'
12 features replaced with exact spec list
Impact: '40% fewer no-shows and reclaim 15+ hours of admin time weekly'
Simulator preview href: /growth/ghost-room.html
CTA href: /growth/ghost-room.html
Committed 301f651 and pushed
ui_upgrades: Scanline CSS overlay on preview screen for depth/realism.

insights: Step-by-step audit replaced all 6 placeholder cards with exact spec copy. All descriptions trimmed to 1-2 sentences per spec scannability rule.
issues_found: All 6 cards had wrong tags, titles, descriptions, features, and impact text vs spec
fixes_applied: Card 2: 'Real Estate Intelligence' / 'Every Lead, Answered Instantly' / 6 spec features / 3x faster response / ghost-room CTA
Card 3: 'Custom Web Architecture' / 'Websites That Think, Not Just Show' / 6 spec features / 40-60% conversions
Card 4: 'Native App Development' / 'Apps Built for Performance' / Swift+Kotlin/offline/push/biometric / 4.6+ stars
Card 5: 'Workflow Automation' / 'Connect Everything, Touch Nothing' / webhook/CRM/invoice/drip/Slack / 20+h saved
Card 6: 'Autonomous Growth Engine' / 'New Clients While You Sleep' / Google Maps Swarm / 15-30 leads/month
Card 7: 'Intelligence Dashboard' / 'See What Others Miss' / live analytics/no-show prediction / 2x reaction time
Committed 026f7ea and pushed

insights: Step 7 spec is explicit: 'Do NOT embed a working chat here — this page is a teaser, the simulator lives on ghost-room.html.' Overrides earlier v3.3 embedded-iframe decision.
Two-column screenshot cards with hover-lift shadow communicate clickability without needing a working embed.
Subtitle updated to spec: 'This is not a mockup. These are live screenshots of the actual system running on WhatsApp right now.'
decisions: Replaced embedded iframe + browser chrome + JS overlay with two-column teaser grid per Step 7 spec.
Removed ~120 lines of iframe CSS and JS (simOverlay, simFrame, IntersectionObserver, chrome bar) — no longer needed.
Both preview cards link to /growth/ghost-room.html. Primary CTA also links there. Secondary is WhatsApp.
issues_found: Previous Step 7 implementation was an embedded iframe, conflicting with explicit spec rule.
fixes_applied: iframe CSS removed: .simulator-frame-wrap, .simulator-chrome, .chrome-dots, .chrome-dot, .chrome-url, .simulator-iframe-container, .simulator-overlay, .sim-launch-icon, .sim-launch-title, .sim-launch-sub
iframe JS removed: simOverlay, simFrame, launchSim(), IntersectionObserver
New: .simulator-grid 2-col, .sim-card with hover-lift, .sim-card-screen (chat-bg teal / dash-bg sand), .sim-card-body
Committed 6aadf91 and pushed
ui_upgrades: chat-bg uses teal gradient tint, dash-bg uses sand gradient tint — visually distinct at a glance.
Hover translateY(-6px) + shadow gives screenshots the feel of clickable product thumbnails.

insights: System tier elevated via translateY(-8px) and teal border-glow — no badges. All three cards use spec-exact CTAs and features.
decisions: Removed card subtitle titles ('Get Your Foot in the Door' etc.) — not in Step 8 spec.
Card 1 'No setup fee' and Card 3 'Custom setup & onboarding' shown in muted-style .pricing-setup box to differentiate visually from Card 2's sand-colored fee callout.
issues_found: Subtitle was 'No hidden fees. No lock-in contracts…' — spec is 'Transparent pricing. No hidden fees.'
All three feature lists wrong vs spec
CTAs: 'Start the Conversation', 'Get Started Today', 'Talk to Us About Scale' — all wrong
fixes_applied: Subtitle corrected to spec
Card 1: 4 spec features, 'No setup fee', CTA 'Start with Awareness'
Card 2: 6 spec features (Calendar sync, reminders, emergency detection, reschedule, no-show prediction), setup fee, CTA 'Activate the System'
Card 3: 6 spec features (client recovery, AI review gen, market monitoring, dedicated manager, custom integrations), CTA 'Talk to Jake'
Committed f542a59 and pushed

insights: 1.15rem body, 1.85 line-height. Decorative quote mark at 8rem, 15% opacity. Georgia serif for signature contrast.
decisions: Human, first-person tone. No corporate language.

insights: WhatsApp button is full-width solid teal — most prominent footer element. Footer bg #080C18 darker than body.
decisions: 3-col grid: brand 2fr | links 1fr | contact 1.5fr. Brand spans full width on tablet.
ui_upgrades: Green pulsing status dot + 'All systems operational' in footer bar.

insights: Service cards: y60→0 + fade, stagger 0.04s. Pricing: y40 + stagger 0.12s. Simulator frame: y40 fade. Jake letter: opacity only. Hero: no animation.
decisions: window load event (not DOMContentLoaded) guarantees deferred GSAP scripts are ready. once:true on all triggers.

fixes_applied: HTML entities for all special characters — no raw Unicode
All CTAs min-height 44px for mobile tap targets
All emojis have aria-label; decorative elements have aria-hidden
container padding 1.5rem mobile — text never touches screen edge
No banned words (guaranteed, revolutionary, Buy Now)
No fake badges anywhere in pricing or services
USD and SAR shown on all priced tiers
Setup fee clearly stated on System tier
All WhatsApp links use wa.me/966570733834
Simulator iframe lazy-loads — no performance hit on page load
Escape closes nav, backdrop click closes nav

issues_found: Database uses Supabase REST API via Axios, so raw db.query from the brief didn't work.
fixes_applied: Wrote wrapper methods in db.js to use Axios instead of raw SQL queries.

next_action.instruction: v3.4 pushed as commit 38f4310. Wait for Render deploy (~2-5 min). Verify qudozen.com shows English v3.4: deep dark background #040914, gold accents, 7 service cards each with How-it-works steps, simulator teaser with browser chrome, correct pricing CTAs. All routing verified: nav submenu deep-links to individual service anchors.

decisions.decision: Bumped to v3.4. Full architecture audit performed. Discovered file had been reverted to old Arabic build — rewrote English LTR build with surface upgrade.
decisions.reasoning: Live site audit via WebFetch showed qudozen.com serving Arabic v3.1, not English v3.3. File was reverted. Session rebuilt from scratch with all fixes applied.

decisions.decision: Simulator iframe approach permanently abandoned. Simulator section is now a premium teaser panel that opens ghost-room.html in a new tab.
decisions.reasoning: CRITICAL BUG FOUND: ghost-room.html's 'Start Simulation' button routes to /#simulator. Embedding ghost-room.html in an iframe creates an infinite redirect loop. New-tab approach eliminates the loop entirely while preserving the ghost-room dwell-tracking analytics.

decisions.decision: All 7 service cards given unique IDs and scroll-margin-top:5rem. Nav submenu deep-links to individual cards.
decisions.reasoning: Previous nav submenu pointed all 7 services to #services (section top). User could not navigate to a specific service from the menu. Individual anchors fix this routing issue.

decisions.decision: ghost-room.html kept as-is (Arabic RTL Tailwind). Not modified.
decisions.reasoning: ghost-room.html serves a separate purpose: Growth Swarm cold outreach landing page (accepts ?clinic=X&city=Y params). It has its own dwell-tracking analytics (pingDwell to /api/ghost-dwell). Modifying it is a separate task.

decisions.decision: Bumped to v3.3. The v3.2 build was reverted because the simulator was a redirect-only teaser. v3.3 embeds the simulator directly via iframe.
decisions.reasoning: Brain insight from revert: 'The embedded interactive simulator is a non-negotiable core feature for the landing page.' This is the primary architectural change in v3.3.

insights: CRITICAL: ghost-room.html loops back to /#simulator. Never embed it in an iframe. Always open in new tab (target=_blank).
ghost-room.html is a Growth Swarm conversion page (accepts ?clinic=X&city=Y), not a general simulator. Do not repurpose it.

The old Arabic site (v3.1) had content the architecture needed: Three Layers of Consciousness, live metrics bar, Operations Room nav link. These were missing from v3.3 but partially restored in v3.4 (Operations Room link back in footer nav).

Service nav submenu must use individual card IDs with scroll-margin-top — not #services anchor. All 7 IDs: service-receptionist, service-realestate, service-web, service-apps, service-automation, service-growth, service-analytics.
direction:rtl trick for alternating service cards collapses cleanly on mobile by removing it at 640px breakpoint.
The file public/index.html was reverted to Arabic v3.1 between sessions. Always confirm file state with Read before writing.
System clock (SYS: HH:MM:SS KSA) in simulator chrome bar creates visual continuity with ghost-room.html aesthetic.
